html:
Exclusive to:

BernieActive BernieBERNIE!Dead Bernie

“A powerful friend when Willow's mind approaches insanity.”

-

Bernie is an item in Don't Starve Together, which can only be crafted by Willow. Bernie can be equipped to the hand slot to exclusively provide Willow 60 freezing insulation and 2 Sanity per minute. While equipped, Bernie will last 15 days.

When Willow is below 15% Sanity, a Bernie within 2 tiles will become BERNIE!. BERNIE! has 2,000 Health and deals 50 damage per hit. BERNIE! can taunt non-boss enemies within 4 tiles to draw aggro, and is capable of damaging Shadow Creatures. Shadow Creatures killed by BERNIE! will only drop one Nightmare Fuel each and will not restore Willow's sanity. Only one BERNIE! will become active for each insane Willow player. BERNIE! cannot be placed in the player's inventory. If Willow is above 15% sanity, and BERNIE! is not attacked for 16 seconds or BERNIE! does not attack for 16 seconds, BERNIE! will revert to Bernie. Bernie is also deactivated when there are no longer any insane players within 7.5 tiles.

If there is already a BERNIE! active for each Willow, remaining Bernies within 4 tiles, when left on the ground, will become active but will not grow in size. This smaller form can walk around and also taunt Shadow Creatures within 4 tiles, but it cannot attack. This Bernie has 1,000 Health. When Bernie and BERNIE's health drops to 0%, it will stop moving and lie on the ground as a dead Bernie. The player can use Sewing Kit or Trusty Tape restore it to 100% durability.

On Lunar Island, Sanity is replaced by Enlightenment, so Bernie will not become active or turn into BERNIE!. If it was active before entering the Lunar Island, it will immediately deactivate.

Contents

  • 1 The Forge
  • 2 Skins
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery
  • 6 Sounds
  • 7 References

The Forge

In The Forge event, Bernie plays the same role as he does in the main game, drawing aggro from mobs while not returning fire. When Bernie loses all his health, all monsters will stop attacking and wander to the nearest player. Willow is able to revive Bernie in three seconds for him to start drawing aggro again.

In the second season of The Forge, when Willow wore the Whispering Grand Armor, Bernie would grow larger and get increased speed and hp. His revive time was also reduced.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Forlorn Doll Collection
Ashley
Willow will be so happy to see Ashley again!
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Sparky
This fiery little pup just melts Willow's heart.

Trivia

  • Bernie first appeared in Willow's Don't Starve character portrait as an unnamed prop. He was officially introduced as an exclusive item for Willow in Don't Starve Together.
    • Developers revealed during the preview stream for A Little Rain Must Fall that Bernie was originally intended to make Willow look "cute and innocent".[1]
  • Bernie's name is a pun of the word "burn."
  • Bernie's crafting description may be a reference to the song "Mad World" by Tears for Fears, in particular the lyrics "all around me are familiar faces".
  • Characters have alternate examination quotes for Bernie in the Forge, but the regular quotes were triggered instead, leaving the Forge quote unimplemented.
  • According to developers in Rhymes With Play #228, a scrapped idea for Winona revolved around her providing upgrades to the other survivors. One concept of this idea presented in the stream was a mechanized Bernie with defensive capabilities.
  • Bernie was updated alongside Willow on May 7, 2019 in Willow's character refresh.[2][3] Before this update, he did not have a BERNIE! form.
  • BERNIE!'s voice is that of a person giggling along with the sound of an animal growling.
  • If Bernie is dropped in the water, he sinks.
  • Bernie has an alternative skin named "Ashley" which is a pun for the word "ashes".
  • Willow and Bernie is likely a reference to Annie and Tibbers from League of Legends.
    • Annie and Willow are both associated with fire. Annie is a pyromantic mage and Willow loves fire.
    • Annie and Willow both have stuffed bears that can help in battle.
    • Both will yell "GET 'EM, [name].

“A teddy bear.”

“I've been told his name is "Bernie".”

“Hello, Squishy Friend!”
–Wormwood, Examining Inactive Bernie
“This little guy's been well loved.”
–Winona, Examining Inactive Bernie
“What a pity.”
–Wortox, Examining Inactive Bernie
“No playing anymore?”
–Wurt, Examining Inactive Bernie
“He burnt himself out.”

“It looks well-loved.”

“Help me, Bernie!”

“Is so brave!”

“He dances to forget the pain.”

“HANG IN THERE, BEAR!”
–WX-78, Examining Active Bernie
“That teddy bear seems to be animated somehow.”
–Wickerbottom, Examining Active Bernie
“I guess I should be used to weird stuff by now.”
–Woodie, Examining Active Bernie
“Just what am I looking at here?”
–Maxwell, Examining Active Bernie
“What a brave beast!”
–Wigfrid, Examining Active Bernie
“That teddy bear is moving!”
–Webber, Examining Active Bernie
“What a silly fellow.”
–Warly, Examining Active Bernie
“Yay! Squishy Friend can play!”
–Wormwood, Examining Active Bernie
“Is he clockwork? Can I peek inside?”
–Winona, Examining Active Bernie
“Good sir, are you aware you've no soul?”
–Wortox, Examining Active Bernie
“Wanna play with it!”
–Wurt, Examining Active Bernie
“Woah! Is your bear haunted? Cursed?”
–Walter, Examining Active Bernie
“How incredible that this isn't even the strangest thing I've seen.”
–Wanda, Examining Active Bernie
“Remind me not to get on Willow's bad side.”
–Wilson, Examining BERNIE!
“GET'EM BERNIE!!!”
–Willow, Examining BERNIE!
“Oh no! Wolfgang has shrunken!”
–Wolfgang, Examining BERNIE!
“Wow... What a big stuffy.”
–Wendy, Examining BERNIE!
“IT FIGHTS FOR MY MINION, AND THEREFORE FOR ME”
–WX-78, Examining BERNIE!
“As whimsical as it is befuddling.”
–Wickerbottom, Examining BERNIE!
“Hm. Yep. Just another day.”
–Woodie, Examining BERNIE!
“How truly unnerving.”
–Maxwell, Examining BERNIE!
“The beast hath been inbued with a fighting spirit!”
–Wigfrid, Examining BERNIE!
“It's creepy and cute at the same time!!”
–Webber, Examining BERNIE!
“Tres géant!”
–Warly, Examining BERNIE!
“Big Squishy Friend!”
–Wormwood, Examining BERNIE!
“That girl knows how to put on a show.”
–Winona, Examining BERNIE!
“It's grown to new heights to win all our fights!”
–Wortox, Examining BERNIE!
“Fun toy, flurp!”
–Wurt, Examining BERNIE!
“If you play with fire, you're gonna get Bernie'd. Heh...”
–Walter, Examining BERNIE!
“I could've sworn you were smaller...”
–Wanda, Examining BERNIE!
“It finally fell apart.”
–Wilson, Examining Dead Bernie
“I need to fix Bernie up.”
–Willow, Examining Dead Bernie
“Is so broken.”
–Wolfgang, Examining Dead Bernie
“He has passed.”
–Wendy, Examining Dead Bernie
“HE HAS DIED”
–WX-78, Examining Dead Bernie
“That bear is in need of repair.”
–Wickerbottom, Examining Dead Bernie
“Poor lil' guy.”
–Woodie, Examining Dead Bernie
“It's seen better days.”
–Maxwell, Examining Dead Bernie
“It has göne to Valhalla.”
–Wigfrid, Examining Dead Bernie
“It's all busted up.”
–Webber, Examining Dead Bernie
“Poor little fellow.”
–Warly, Examining Dead Bernie
“What happened?”
–Wormwood, Examining Dead Bernie
“He's a bit of a fixer-upper.”

“He seemed a fine chap.”

“Aww...”
–Wurt, Examining Dead Bernie
“I-I'm sure we can fix him.”
–Walter, Examining Dead Bernie
“This can't be the end. We'll fix this!”
–Wanda, Examining Dead Bernie
“A powerful friend when Willow's mind approaches insanity.”

The Forge[edit | edit source]
“He might make a good distraction for us.”
–Wilson, in their unimplemented quote for Bernie in The Forge.
“You're always there for me, Bernie.”
–Willow, in their unimplemented quote for Bernie in The Forge.
“Nice little creepy bear.”
–Wolfgang, in their unimplemented quote for Bernie in The Forge.
“How do you do, Bernie?”
–Wendy, in their unimplemented quote for Bernie in The Forge.
“I WILL USE THIS BEAR TO SHIELD ME”
–WX-78, in their unimplemented quote for Bernie in The Forge.
“Fascinating. It is animated, even here.”
–Wickerbottom, in their unimplemented quote for Bernie in The Forge.
“Hey there little fella.”
–Woodie, in their unimplemented quote for Bernie in The Forge.
“That thing's still shambling about, I see.”
–Maxwell, in their unimplemented quote for Bernie in The Forge.
“The call öf battle has arisen in thee!”
–Wigfrid, in their unimplemented quote for Bernie in The Forge.
“Oh! Willow brought Bernie!”
–Webber, in their unimplemented quote for Bernie in The Forge.
“You here to help, lil fella?”
–Winona, in their unimplemented quote for Bernie in The Forge.
In The Forge event, Bernie plays the same role as he does in the main game, drawing aggro from mobs while not returning fire. When Bernie loses all his health, all monsters will stop attacking and wander to the nearest player. Willow is able to revive Bernie in three seconds for him to start drawing aggro again.
In the second season of The Forge, when Willow wore the Whispering Grand Armor, Bernie would grow larger and get increased speed and hp. His revive time was also reduced.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Bernie first appeared in Willow's Don't Starve character portrait as an unnamed prop. He was officially introduced as an exclusive item for Willow in Don't Starve Together.
Developers revealed during the preview stream for A Little Rain Must Fall that Bernie was originally intended to make Willow look "cute and innocent".[1]
Bernie's name is a pun of the word "burn."
Bernie's crafting description may be a reference to the song "Mad World" by Tears for Fears, in particular the lyrics "all around me are familiar faces".
Characters have alternate examination quotes for Bernie in the Forge, but the regular quotes were triggered instead, leaving the Forge quote unimplemented.
According to developers in Rhymes With Play #228, a scrapped idea for Winona revolved around her providing upgrades to the other survivors. One concept of this idea presented in the stream was a mechanized Bernie with defensive capabilities.
Bernie was updated alongside Willow on May 7, 2019 in Willow's character refresh.[2][3] Before this update, he did not have a BERNIE! form.
BERNIE!'s voice is that of a person giggling along with the sound of an animal growling.
If Bernie is dropped in the water, he sinks.
Bernie has an alternative skin named "Ashley" which is a pun for the word "ashes".
Willow and Bernie is likely a reference to Annie and Tibbers from League of Legends.
Annie and Willow are both associated with fire. Annie is a pyromantic mage and Willow loves fire.
Annie and Willow both have stuffed bears that can help in battle.
Both will yell "GET 'EM, [name].

BERNIE! cannot be placed in the player's inventory. If Willow is above 15% sanity, and BERNIE! is not attacked for 16 seconds or BERNIE! does not attack for 16 seconds, BERNIE! will revert to Bernie. Bernie is also deactivated when there are no longer any insane players within 7.5 tiles. If there is already a BERNIE! active for each Willow, remaining Bernies within 4 tiles, when left on the ground, will become active but will not grow in size. This smaller form can walk around and also taunt Shadow Creatures within 4 tiles, but it cannot attack. This Bernie has 1,000 Health. When Bernie and BERNIE's health drops to 0%, it will stop moving and lie on the ground as a dead Bernie. The player can use [[Sewing Kit]] or [[Trusty Tape]] restore it to 100% durability. On [[Lunar Island]], Sanity is replaced by [[Enlightenment]], so Bernie will not become active or turn into BERNIE!. If it was active before entering the Lunar Island, it will immediately deactivate. {{Object Infobox |name = BERNIE! |image = Bernie Big.png|General Bernie Big Lunar.png|Lunar Bernie Big Shadow.png|Shadow |health = 2000 |specialAbility = Taunts and attacks [[Mob]]s. |damage = 50 |attackPeriod = 2 |attackRange = 3 |walkSpeed = 4.5 |runSpeed = 11 |drops = [[File:DeadBernie.png|45px]] |spawnFrom = {{pic|32|Bernie}} |spawnCode = "bernie_big" |planarEntityProtection = Yes (Lunar or Shadow aligned only) }} =={{Pic32|Forging Hammer}} The Forge == {{Quotes |wilson = He might make a good distraction for us. |willow = You're always there for me, Bernie. |wolfgang = Nice little creepy bear. |wendy = How do you do, Bernie? |wx78 = I WILL USE THIS BEAR TO SHIELD ME |wickerbottom = Fascinating. It is animated, even here. |woodie = Hey there little fella. |maxwell = That thing's still shambling about, I see. |wigfrid = The call öf battle has arisen in thee! |webber = Oh! Willow brought Bernie! |winona = You here to help, lil fella? |source = in their unimplemented quote for Bernie in The Forge. |choose = webber }} In ''[[The Forge]]'' [[:Category:Events|event]], Bernie plays the same role as he does in the main game, drawing aggro from mobs while not returning fire. When Bernie loses all his health, all monsters will stop attacking and wander to the nearest player. Willow is able to revive Bernie in three seconds for him to start drawing aggro again. In the second season of ''The Forge'', when Willow wore the Whispering Grand Armor, Bernie would grow larger and get increased speed and hp. His revive time was also reduced. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Bernie-0|Belongings}}
{{SkinInfo |image = Ashley Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Forlorn Doll Collection |name = Ashley |description = Willow will be so happy to see Ashley again! |ingame = Ashley.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = Sparky Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |name = Sparky |description = This fiery little pup just melts Willow's heart. }}
== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * Bernie first appeared in Willow's ''Don't Starve'' character portrait as an unnamed prop. He was officially introduced as an exclusive item for Willow in ''Don't Starve Together''. ** Developers revealed during the preview stream for ''[[Don't Starve/Version History#March 12th.2C 2013 - A Little Rain Must Fall|A Little Rain Must Fall]]'' that Bernie was originally intended to make Willow look "cute and innocent".[http://archive.li/OfRbm Archive of forum thread "What the Devs said during the live stream"], March 11, 2013 * Bernie's name is a pun of the word "burn." * Bernie's crafting description may be a reference to the song "Mad World" by [[wikipedia:Tears for Fears|Tears for Fears]], in particular the lyrics "all around me are familiar faces". * Characters have alternate examination quotes for Bernie in the Forge, but the regular quotes were triggered instead, leaving the Forge quote unimplemented. * According to developers in ''Rhymes With Play'' #228, a scrapped idea for Winona revolved around her providing upgrades to the other survivors. One concept of this idea presented in the stream was a mechanized Bernie with defensive capabilities. * Bernie was updated alongside Willow on May 7, 2019 in Willow's character refresh.[https://forums.kleientertainment.com/forums/topic/105367-willow-refresh-info-and-roadmap-schedule-update/ Willow Refresh Info and Roadmap Schedule Update]. Posted on April 25, 2019[https://forums.kleientertainment.com/forums/topic/105789-willow-character-update-and-more/ Willow Character Update and More!]. Posted on May 7, 2019 Before this update, he did not have a BERNIE! form. * BERNIE!'s voice is that of a person giggling along with the sound of an animal growling. * If Bernie is dropped in the water, he sinks. * Bernie has an alternative skin named "Ashley" which is a pun for the word "ashes". *Willow and Bernie is likely a reference to Annie and Tibbers from ''League of Legends.'' **Annie and Willow are both associated with fire. Annie is a pyromantic mage and Willow loves fire. **Annie and Willow both have stuffed bears that can help in battle. **Both will yell "GET 'EM, [name]. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Bernie= Bernie Active.png|Active Bernie Inactive.png|Inactive DeadBernie.png|Dead Bernie Big.png|BERNIE!
